info.title: C4SCLI - Tool for C4Sharp
info.description: C4Sharp (C4S) is a simple .NET superset of C4-PlantUML to generate C4 diagrams as code (C#). It's used for building Context, Container, Component and Deployment diagrams.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ModelBindingCommandHandler.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

commands.name: build
commands.description: Execute runners into solution that implements 'IDiagramBuildRunner' Interface

options.name: output
options.description: The output path, if not informed it will search for the first sln file into current directory

options.name: doc
options.description: set 'html' to output a document as html page

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: The solution file path, if not informed it will search for the first sln file into current directory [default: .]
